name_en: New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ New Upgraded Triome Folio
name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ New Upgraded Triome Folio
Summer26 latest style in the Triome family 👜
Triome Folio medium handbag is here. Clean long body, embossed gold Triumph buckle, simple and elegant.
Added a handle: short top handle for a refined look 🤳
Add a shoulder strap for a relaxed commuter style.\Fits card holder + phone + touch-up essentials.\Lightweight, comfortable to carry all day 👍🏻
Style No.: 123203
Color: Black Crocodile Silver Buckle
Size: 25.5x14x7.5cm
(Original packaging included)
